sql.if:
AND (
c.source_url LIKE '%ourworldindata.org/data-insights/%'
c.source_url LIKE '%pudding.cool/%'
c.source_url LIKE '%iea.org/policies/%'
c.source_url LIKE '%cloud.kepuchina.cn/newSearch/imgText%'
c.source_url LIKE '%huanbao.in-en.com%'
c.source_url LIKE '%tanpaifang.com/%'
c.source_url LIKE '%ets.sceex.com.cn/%'
c.source_url LIKE '%cteam.org.cn/%'
c.source_url LIKE '%earth.org/%'
c.source_url LIKE '%ecoepn.com/%'
c.source_url LIKE CONCAT('%', #{key}, '%')
)

mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.type, COALESCE(ci.title, c.title) AS title, COALESCE(ci.summary, c.summary) AS summary, COALESCE(ci.body, c.body) AS body, c.cover_url, c.source_type, c.source_url, c.published_at, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at, COALESCE(s.like_count, 0) AS like_count, COALESCE(s.fav_count, 0) AS fav_count, COALESCE(s.down_count, 0) AS down_count, COALESCE(s.comment_count, 0) AS comment_count, COALESCE(s.view_count, 0) AS view_count, COALESCE(s.hot_score, 0) AS hot_score FROM social.content c LEFT JOIN social.content_i18n ci ON ci.content_id = c.id AND ci.locale = #{locale} LEFT JOIN social.content_stats s ON c.id = s.content_id WHERE c.id = #{contentId}::uuid

SELECT r.target_id AS content_id, BOOL_OR(CASE WHEN r.reaction_type = 1 THEN true ELSE false END) AS liked, BOOL_OR(CASE WHEN r.reaction_type = 2 THEN true ELSE false END) AS favorited, BOOL_OR(CASE WHEN r.reaction_type = 3 THEN true ELSE false END) AS downvoted FROM social.reaction r WHERE r.user_id = #{userId}::uuid AND r.target_type = 1 AND r.target_id IN
#{id}::uuid
GROUP BY r.target_id

SELECT c.id, c.type, COALESCE(ci.title, c.title) AS title, COALESCE(ci.summary, c.summary) AS summary, c.cover_url, c.source_url, c.published_at, c.status, c.created_at, COALESCE(s.like_count, 0) AS like_count, COALESCE(s.fav_count, 0) AS fav_count, COALESCE(s.comment_count, 0) AS comment_count, COALESCE(s.view_count, 0) AS view_count, COALESCE(s.hot_score, 0) AS hot_score FROM social.content c LEFT JOIN social.content_i18n ci ON ci.content_id = c.id AND ci.locale = #{locale} LEFT JOIN social.content_stats s ON c.id = s.content_id WHERE c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC, c.published_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT #{limit}
